sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_trimRight (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_trimRight VALUES (1, '     Hello, world!     ');
UPDATE test_trimRight SET text = trimRight(text) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, trimRight(text) AS trimmed_text FROM test_trimRight;
SELECT trimRight('     Example of trimRight function.     ') AS example_output;
